product: Databricks Genie App in Microsoft Teams
tagline: Now in Public Preview, enabling seamless data queries within Teams.
what_it_does: The Databricks Genie app integrates with Microsoft Teams, allowing users to ask data-related questions and receive answers directly within the Teams environment. Users can interact with the app via direct messages or by mentioning `@Databricks Genie` in channels, with options for channel owners to pin specific Genie Agents for tailored responses. The app maintains the same trust and safety standards as the standalone Genie application.
why_it_matters: This integration enhances productivity by allowing data queries without switching applications, streamlining workflows for data teams. It empowers users to access insights quickly, reducing the time spent on data retrieval and improving decision-making processes. Organizations can leverage this feature to foster a data-driven culture within their teams.
plain_summary: Users can now ask data questions directly in Microsoft Teams using the Databricks Genie app.

capabilities.title: Direct Messaging
capabilities.desc: Users can ask questions directly to the Genie app in private messages.

capabilities.title: Channel Integration
capabilities.desc: Channel owners can configure the app for specific use cases by pinning Genie Agents.

capabilities.title: Custom Configurations
capabilities.desc: Settings for workspace selection and message visibility can be customized at multiple levels.

capabilities.title: AI Trust and Safety
capabilities.desc: The app adheres to the same trust and safety standards as the standalone Genie.

prerequisites: Account admin must enable the Databricks Microsoft Teams App preview.
Add Databricks control plane outbound IPs to the IP access list if applicable.
Download the Microsoft Teams app if using a custom installation.
use_cases: Data teams can quickly retrieve insights during meetings.
Business analysts can ask ad-hoc questions without leaving Teams.
Data-driven decision-making can be facilitated in real-time discussions.
limitations: Cannot specify which SQL warehouse the app uses; it selects automatically.
Sending Databricks notifications to Teams is not supported.
Triggering actions in Databricks from Teams is not supported.

steps.title: Enable Preview
steps.desc: Account admin enables the Databricks Microsoft Teams App preview in the account console.

steps.title: Install App
steps.desc: A Microsoft 365 admin installs the Databricks Genie app from the Microsoft marketplace.

steps.title: Grant Permissions
steps.desc: Admin grants necessary permissions in the Microsoft Entra portal.

steps.title: Configure Settings
steps.desc: Channel owners configure Genie settings for their channels.

steps.title: Start Using
steps.desc: Users begin interacting with the Genie app in Teams.

key_takeaway: The Databricks Genie app in Microsoft Teams enhances data accessibility and collaboration for users within their existing workflows.
